title: Sales, advertisement must contain title of suit
doc_html:
§210.  Sales, advertisement must contain title of suit

In all advertisements of sales of property under execution, the sheriff shall be bound to insert the title of the suit in which the writ is issued.
doc_text:
§210.  Sales, advertisement must contain title of suit
In all advertisements of sales of property under execution, the sheriff shall be bound to insert the title of the suit in which the writ is issued.
